title: Assoc. Prof. Muhammed SULU
content:
Assoc. Prof. Muhammed SULU

Resume

YÖK Akademik

Full Time

Resume

He graduated from Koç Üniversitesi Hukuk Fakültesi (Koç University Faculty of Law) in three and a half years, having been named to the Dean's Honors List and receiving four "Vehbi Koç Honor Awards." His thesis titled “Ticarî Sırların Korunması” (Protection of Trade Secrets) for the Private Law Master’s Program at Galatasaray Üniversitesi (Galatasaray University) was unanimously accepted. He completed the Private Law Doctoral Program at Marmara Üniversitesi (Marmara University), which he started in September 2015, in February 2019 with his work titled “Anonim Ortaklıklarda Şirket Menfaati Kavramı” (The Concept of Corporate Interest in Joint Stock Companies), earning him the title of Doctor of Laws.

He concentrates his studies on the fields of Ticari İşletme Hukuku (Commercial Enterprise Law), Kıymetli Evrak Hukuku (Negotiable Instruments Law), and Şirketler Hukuku (Company Law). He has two published books and numerous articles written in these areas to date.
